description: The warrior class. Excels at Strength scaling, Exhaust synergies, and self-damage for powerful effects. Most beginner-friendly character with reliable healing from Burning Blood.
starting_relic_effect: Heal 6 HP at end of combat

archetypes.name: Strength Scaling
archetypes.description: Stack Strength with Demon Form, Inflame, and multi-hit attacks for massive damage.
archetypes.strategy: Get Inflame early for immediate value. Demon Form is your late-game win condition. Multi-hit attacks multiply your Strength bonus. Pair with Vulnerable for even more damage.

archetypes.name: Exhaust Engine
archetypes.description: Use Corruption + Dark Embrace + Feel No Pain for an unstoppable engine that draws cards, gains Block, and thins your deck.
archetypes.strategy: The holy trinity: Corruption makes Skills free but Exhausts them, Dark Embrace draws on Exhaust, Feel No Pain blocks on Exhaust. Once assembled, you cycle your entire deck every turn.

archetypes.name: Barricade Block
archetypes.description: Use Barricade to retain Block between turns, then convert Block to damage with Body Slam.
archetypes.strategy: Get Barricade online ASAP. Stack Block cards and Body Slam converts your defense into offense. Very tanky build that can handle any boss.

general_tips: Burning Blood heals 6 HP per fight - value small fights early
Exhaust synergies are the strongest Ironclad archetype
Strength is multiplicative with multi-hit cards
Don't be afraid to lose HP for powerful effects (Bloodletting, Blood Wall)
Bash is your only starter with Vulnerable - upgrade it early

description: The rogue class. Excels at Poison, Shiv spam, and card draw. Ring of the Snake provides excellent turn 1 hands. New Sly keyword adds auto-play when cards are discarded.
starting_relic_effect: Draw 2 additional cards at start of combat

archetypes.name: Poison
archetypes.description: Stack Poison with Deadly Poison, Bouncing Flask, and Accelerant. Poison scales exponentially with Catalyst.
archetypes.strategy: Accelerant is the key rare - makes Poison trigger twice per turn. Bubble Bubble for massive Poison on already-poisoned enemies. Works great against bosses with high HP.

archetypes.name: Shiv Spam
archetypes.description: Generate Shivs with Blade Dance, Cloak and Dagger, and Infinite Blades. Scale with Accuracy and Fan of Knives.
archetypes.strategy: Accuracy is core - each Shiv deals 4 extra damage. Fan of Knives makes Shivs hit ALL enemies. Finisher as a closer after playing many attacks. After Image for Block per Shiv.

archetypes.name: Discard/Sly
archetypes.description: Abuse the Sly keyword - cards with Sly auto-play for free when discarded. Draw and discard for massive value.
archetypes.strategy: New STS2 mechanic. Cards with Sly play themselves when discarded. Combine with heavy draw and discard effects for virtually limitless free card plays.

general_tips: Ring of the Snake gives you 7 cards on turn 1 - powerful opening
Backflip is one of the best commons (Block + Draw)
Poison is your best scaling for boss fights
Weak is very powerful defensively - Neutralize is a great starter
Shiv builds need Accuracy to work well

description: The robot class. Manages Orbs (Lightning, Frost, Dark, Plasma) in Orb Slots. Focus increases Orb effectiveness. Methodical playstyle with massive scaling potential.
starting_relic_effect: Channel 1 Lightning at start of combat

archetypes.name: Orb/Focus Scaling
archetypes.description: Stack Focus with Defragment and channel Frost/Lightning Orbs for automatic damage and Block every turn.
archetypes.strategy: Focus multiplies ALL Orb output. Defragment is your most important card. Frost Orbs + Focus = massive passive Block. Lightning Orbs + Focus = massive passive damage.

archetypes.name: Claw Deck
archetypes.description: Zero-cost Attack spam with Claw scaling. All for One retrieves all 0-cost cards from discard.
archetypes.strategy: Every Claw played increases ALL Claws' damage permanently. FTL and other 0-costs for draw. Very fast, aggressive build. Weak against high-HP enemies without enough Claws.

archetypes.name: Dark Orb
archetypes.description: Channel Dark Orbs that scale damage over time, then Evoke for massive burst.
archetypes.strategy: Dark Orbs gain damage passively each turn. Evoke them with Dualcast for huge burst damage. Patient playstyle.

general_tips: Focus is king - every point multiplies ALL your Orbs
Frost Orbs are your primary defense
Channel order matters - rightmost Orb gets Evoked first
Capacitor for more Orb Slots means more passive effects
Echo Form is insane - doubles your first card each turn

description: Brand new character in STS2. Summons a bone companion 'Osty' who fights alongside you. Uses Doom to execute enemies and Souls for various effects. Graveyard (Exhaust pile) is a resource.
starting_relic_effect: At start of turn, Summon 1 (adds HP to Osty)

archetypes.name: Summon/Osty
archetypes.description: Build up Osty's HP with Summon cards, then use Osty to attack and tank hits for you.
archetypes.strategy: Summon adds HP to Osty. Osty intercepts attacks (second health pool!). Calcify makes Osty hit harder. Bone Shards sacrifices Osty for AoE damage + Block. Reanimate brings Osty back.

archetypes.name: Doom Execution
archetypes.description: Apply Doom stacks to enemies. When Doom >= enemy HP, they die instantly.
archetypes.strategy: Doom is an execution mechanic - enemy dies when HP <= Doom stacks. Countdown auto-applies 6 Doom per turn. End of Days is the ultimate finisher. Pair with Vulnerable/Weak to survive while Doom builds.

archetypes.name: Soul Engine
archetypes.description: Generate Souls (0-cost Ethereal cards) and trigger powerful effects when playing them.
archetypes.strategy: Souls trigger Haunt (damage), Devour Life (Summon), and other effects. Grave Warden adds Souls while blocking. Generate Souls then play them for cascading effects.

general_tips: Osty is your second health pool - keep him alive
Bodyguard is your most important starter card
Doom execution bypasses high-HP enemies
Souls are free to play and trigger many synergies
Graveblast and Dredge retrieve cards from discard pile
You beat Ceremonial Beast with Necrobinder - the character works!

description: Brand new character in STS2. Uses Stars (persistent, uncapped resource) and Forge (powers up Sovereign Blade). Commands minions through Transform cards. Cosmic power fantasy.
starting_relic_effect: Gain 1 Star at start of combat

archetypes.name: Star Burst
archetypes.description: Accumulate Stars (don't reset between turns, no cap) then spend them on powerful Star-cost cards for massive burst turns.
archetypes.strategy: Stars persist between turns and have no cap. Gather Light and Glow generate Stars while blocking/drawing. Genesis auto-generates Stars each turn. Black Hole deals damage whenever you gain/spend Stars. Save for big burst turns.

archetypes.name: Sovereign Blade Forge
archetypes.description: Use Forge cards to power up Sovereign Blade, then deliver one massive hit.
archetypes.strategy: Sovereign Blade has Retain - stays in hand until played. Forge cards increase its damage and return it to hand. Furnace auto-Forges each turn. Build up then deliver a finishing blow.

archetypes.name: Minion Commander
archetypes.description: Transform cards into Minion cards that fight for you.
archetypes.strategy: Transform your weaker cards into powerful Minion versions. Minion Strike, Minion Dive Bomb, Minion Sacrifice all do powerful things.

general_tips: Stars DON'T reset between turns - accumulate patiently
Sovereign Blade has Retain - it stays in hand
Don't rush Star spending early - build up first
Act 2 can be rough - you died to Bygone Effigy, so build defense
Falling Star is a great starter - Weak + Vulnerable in one card
Colorless cards trigger Arsenal's Strength gain
